title: ditoxia lyrata
intro: Ditoxia lyrata, also known as Blue Devil, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce sweating and relieve respiratory issues due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Ditoxia lyrata include relieving symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as reducing fever and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Ditoxia lyrata can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
